startPoint.en: Speak to Death in the City of Um.
startPoint.es: Habla con Death en la City of Um.

items.name: Necromantic focus
items.display: Restored necromantic focus, or: A necromantic focus (damaged) 30 ancient vis 26 blood of Orcus 20 imperial steel

items.name: Blood of Orcus
items.display: 104 blood of Orcus (in material storage container)

rewards.name: Necromancy XP lamp (Tomes of the Warlock)
Archaeology XP lamp (Tomes of the Warlock)
Incantations
rewards.display: Ability to learn four ancient Necromancy incantations from the Well of Souls: Darkness Greater Bone Shield Invoke Death Life Transfer

text.en: Talk to Death in the City of Um.
text.es: Habla con Death en la City of Um.

text.en: Teleport to Kharid-et Dig Site and talk to Dr Nabanik.
text.es: Teletranspórtate a Kharid-et Dig Site y habla con Dr Nabanik.

text.en: Head to the Exam Centre and talk to the Head of Research next to the research notes, giving him a restored necromantic focus artefact.
text.es: Dirígete al Exam Centre y habla con el Head of Research junto a las notas de investigación, entregándole un artefacto de enfoque nigromántico restaurado.

text.en: Go through the first three (smoke and blood are the same) book dialogues, which requires talking to him multiple times.
text.es: Completa los tres primeros diálogos de libros (smoke y blood son iguales), lo que requiere hablar con él varias veces.

text.en: Talk to Reldo, the librarian in Varrock Palace to retrieve the damaged Book of Ice.
text.es: Habla con Reldo, el bibliotecario de Varrock Palace, para recuperar el Book of Ice dañado.

text.en: Talk to Aubury at Aubury's Rune Shop, south of Varrock east bank.
text.es: Habla con Aubury en Aubury's Rune Shop, al sur del banco este de Varrock.

text.en: Head to the 1st floor of Wizards' Tower, by fairy ring DIS, wicked hood, or teleporting with stardust.
text.es: Dirígete a la 1ª planta del Wizards' Tower, mediante el fairy ring DIS, el wicked hood, o teletransportándote con stardust.

text.en: Talk to Wizard Borann located on the west side of the 1st floor to retrieve the damaged Book of Smoke.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Borann, ubicado en el lado oeste de la 1ª planta, para recuperar el Book of Smoke dañado.

text.en: Continue the dialogue to ask him about the Book of Blood.
text.es: Continúa el diálogo para preguntarle sobre el Book of Blood.

text.en: Talk to Wizard Frumscone in the basement of the guild to receive the damaged Book of Blood.
text.es: Habla con Wizard Frumscone en el sótano del gremio para recibir el Book of Blood dañado.
Dirígete al Imperial District de Menaphos.

text.en: Talk to Kohnen the librarian in the Grand Library of Menaphos.
text.es: Habla con Kohnen, el bibliotecario de la Grand Library of Menaphos.

text.en: Inspect the sundial in the middle of the bottom floor to retrieve the damaged Book of Shadow.
text.es: Inspecciona el reloj de sol en medio de la planta baja para recuperar el Book of Shadow dañado.

text.en: Repair the books at any archaeologist's workbench.
text.es: Repara los libros en cualquier mesa de trabajo de arqueólogo.

text.en: Hand in to Head of Research.
Talk to Death in City of Um.
text.es: Habla con Death en la City of Um.

text.en: Talk to Ted beside the Well of Souls at the ritual site.
text.es: Habla con Ted junto al Well of Souls en el lugar del ritual.
